name: Ayyubid Fast 2 TC (Beasty)
author: SideboardP
reasoning: From Beasty: the Military Wing's free desert raiders cover you while an extremely fast second TC out-booms almost every civ in the game.

notes: 5 villager abbasid to sheep & 1 villager abbasid builds house of wisdom + house + mining camp on stone (goes to stone after)
Rally point first 2 villager abbasid to different trees
Rally point next 3 villager abbasid to stone

Age up with culture wing (Advancement) & send 1 villager abbasid from sheep to trees after producing another villager abbasid (to make sure there is no gap in villager abbasid production) & rally point next 4 villager abbasid to third trees
Where to place your second TC aswell as your future worker split depend on your and your opponents strat.
Once stone is at 900 all villager abbasid force drop off & rally point to sheep
Repair 2nd town center with all 4 villager abbasid from stone + 5 villager abbasid from trees
Start building barracks archery range stable & blacksmith OR transition into age 3
